recent_calls.summary: The user, Fati from American Home Shield, called regarding a member's air conditioning claim and requested to be connected to a live dispatcher. The agent explained the process for home warranty work and then transferred the call to a live dispatcher as requested.
No conversation happened.
The user, Janice, requested to be connected to a live person after speaking with the agent Sophie. The agent promptly transferred the call to a live agent as requested.

Janice called to check on the status of her furnace installation and expressed urgency due to health concerns. The AI agent acknowledged her request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The call ended with a successful transfer to a human agent.
Pete Fisher called to discuss issues with his furnace and mentioned difficulty reaching Cole Ryan. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist further.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, acknowledged the request and completed the transfer successfully.
The user called and was greeted by the agent Sophie, who then transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance. The transfer was completed successfully.
The user received a call and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, initiated the transfer promptly without further conversation.

The agent called the user by mistake and quickly attempted to transfer the call to a live agent for assistance. The call was successfully transferred shortly after the user expressed confusion about the call origin.

The user called to discuss a flagged payment on the business account and requested to speak with the primary administrator. The agent informed the user that billing information was not accessible and transferred the call to the billing team for assistance.
The user called to schedule an appointment and was promptly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent facilitated the transfer successfully without any issues.

Beverly called to schedule a routine spring AC check for her home at 1421 Heritage Landing, St Charles, Missouri, preferring Thursday, May 28th in the morning at 8 AM. The agent documented the request but was unable to confirm the booking due to a system error, and informed Beverly that the team would follow up to confirm the appointment.

The user expressed frustration about a technician who was supposed to arrive but had not shown up, with conflicting location updates. The agent acknowledged the issue and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.
The call was very brief with the agent greeting the user, but the user hung up immediately without any further interaction.
The call was very brief, with the agent greeting the user and asking how to assist, but the user hung up immediately without responding.

The user called to schedule a service appointment for a heating system issue covered by American Home Shield. The agent collected all necessary details, including the dispatch number, and confirmed the appointment request. The user declined information about maintenance programs, and the call ended successfully with a promise of follow-up from Budget Heating, Cooling & Plumbing.
The user was transferred to a live agent after a brief initial interaction. The call lasted 18 seconds and ended with a successful transfer to another representative.

Kathia called Budget to schedule a service appointment for her air conditioner, which was not cooling, under her American Home Shield home warranty. The agent confirmed the details, including the dispatch number and contact information, and informed her that someone would reach out soon to confirm availability. Kathia declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the AI assistant's professionalism and efficiency.

The user called to check if they had an appointment but no appointment was found under their information. The user requested to be transferred to a live representative, and the agent successfully transferred the call.
The user called asking to speak with Amy. The agent attempted to connect the user to a live agent who could assist, and the call was successfully transferred.

The user called to confirm the time window for their service appointment. The agent confirmed the user's details and informed them that the technician, Cole, is scheduled to arrive between 2 and 3 PM today. The user acknowledged the information and did not request further assistance.

Andrea from American Home Shield called to follow up on scheduling a dispatch for a cooling service under a home warranty for Philip Berwick. The agent confirmed details and noted the request to see if an earlier appointment than the scheduled Thursday the 28th could be arranged, following American Home Shield's guidelines. The call ended with the agent confirming that someone from Budget would reach out shortly and the user declining additional maintenance program information.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live customer service agent for further assistance. The initial agent, Sophie, facilitated the transfer without any issues.

The user inquired about backflow testing services and the agent confirmed that the service is offered. The agent identified itself as an AI and requested the user's full name to proceed with the backflow testing request, but the call ended shortly after.
The user called to speak with Amy, and the agent attempted to transfer the call to the appropriate person. The call was successfully transferred without further conversation.
The user called and was quickly transferred to a live agent for further assistance. The initial agent did not engage in a detailed conversation but facilitated the transfer successfully.
The call was very brief and disconnected almost immediately after it started, with no meaningful conversation taking place.

The user, Randy, reported that his air conditioner was not turning on and expressed that it was an emergency due to discomfort in the home. The agent booked a service appointment for the same day at 4 PM and informed Randy about the dispatch fee. The call concluded with the user declining to provide feedback and the agent confirming the appointment details.

The user called and identified themselves as a customer service agent. The agent attempted to assist but then transferred the call to a live agent for further help. The call lasted 15 seconds and ended with a successful transfer.

The user called to get back to a person who had contacted them about scheduling and requested to speak with a customer service agent. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent who could assist with scheduling.
The user called back after missing a call and requested a callback. The agent acknowledged the request and transferred the call to a live agent for further assistance.

The user called to inquire about the heating and cooling technician's arrival time and requested the repairman to come at 9:30 AM or 9:00 AM. The agent informed the user that the schedule could not be confirmed before 8 AM and offered to pass along the request for follow-up. The user provided their phone number for a callback.

The user called to leave a message requesting a callback to pay a bill. The agent confirmed the callback request and assured the user that the team would contact them on the next business day. The call ended politely with no further questions.

The agent repeatedly tried to engage Tom to specify his service needs for heating, cooling, or plumbing, but Tom's responses were mostly inaudible or unclear. The call ended due to inactivity without a clear resolution or service request.

The user called to request a heating quote to be resent as they did not receive the original email after a technician visit. The agent confirmed the user's email address and arranged for the quote to be resent the next business day. The user also expressed interest in receiving information about home maintenance programs and provided positive feedback about the interaction.
The call was very brief with only the agent greeting the user and the user responding with a simple 'Hi'. No further conversation or assistance took place before the user hung up.

The user, Carolyn, called to speak with a live person regarding a repair appointment but was informed it was after-hours. She provided her phone number and expressed concern about not hearing from the repairman after a call earlier in the day. The agent offered to have the team contact her the next business day.

The user, Alex, called to schedule a service appointment for an HVAC issue where the thermostat and furnace are not working. The agent confirmed the service details, appointment preferences, and contact information, and the user agreed to receive information about home maintenance programs. The call ended with the agent assuring follow-up from the team.

The user called to inquire about payment options and financing for services. The agent provided information on various payment methods and financing partners and arranged for the team to follow up with detailed information on the next business day. The user also requested a review of all current offers and promotions on their account, which the agent noted for follow-up.

The user called and wanted to speak with someone at the company but decided to call back during regular business hours instead. The agent offered to take a message or assist further, but the user declined and ended the call.

The call consisted of an automated school announcement about backpack policies and dismissal times, followed by the agent introducing herself and the user ending the call immediately. No interaction or assistance was provided by the agent.

The user, Jin, called to schedule an emergency service call for cooling issues when the heating is running. The agent documented the emergency and escalated the issue for follow-up on the next business day, as it was after-hours. The call ended with the user confirming no further assistance was needed.

Karen and Eugene called to confirm if they needed to schedule a follow-up appointment for Freon refill on their air conditioner after a technician visited but did not complete the service. The agent confirmed their request and noted that the team would reach out to coordinate the return visit. The user declined information about maintenance programs and gave positive feedback about the call experience.

Robin called to schedule an urgent service appointment for a cooling system compressor issue. The agent confirmed the service details, including the address and preferred time, and informed Robin that the team would contact them early the next business day to confirm the appointment. The call ended with both parties confirming the information and expressing thanks.

The user, Craig, called Budget's after-hours service after missing a callback. The agent confirmed the missed call and offered to have the team follow up on the next business day, which Craig agreed to. The call ended with the agent noting the request for a follow-up and no further details from the user.

The user called to schedule an appointment for routine AC maintenance after being unable to get a weekend slot. The agent took the request for any weekday after 5 PM and confirmed the service address and details. The user was informed that the team would follow up to confirm availability.

The user called after hours to check if they were on schedule and to leave a flexible request for service. The agent informed the user that the main team was unavailable but took down the information and assured a follow-up on the next business day. The user was satisfied with the arrangement and ended the call politely.

The user called to inquire about financing options through Synchrony for a split system upgrade or repair for which they already have quotes. The agent confirmed the details and scheduled a follow-up call for the next business day to discuss financing options. The user declined information about maintenance programs and feedback at the end of the call.
